# Squarespell Quiz

> Squarespell Quiz is an AI-powered quiz funnel builder built exclusively for Squarespace websites. Paste any Squarespace URL and the AI reads your brand colors, fonts, copy, and business type -- then generates a fully branded, interactive quiz in under 2 minutes. Embed with a single JavaScript snippet. Used to turn passive website traffic into segmented, scored email leads.

## Core Concept

Squarespell Quiz works by scanning your Squarespace website URL. The AI analyzes your existing brand identity -- colors, typography, tone, and visual style -- and applies it automatically to your quiz. No manual design, no coding, no separate design tool required. Your quiz looks like a native part of your website from the moment it is created.

The quiz embeds directly inside your Squarespace page as a native component -- not a third-party iframe that breaks your layout or clashes with your brand.

## How It Works -- Step by Step

1. Paste your Squarespace website URL into the quiz builder
2. The AI scans your site and extracts brand colors, fonts, copy tone, and business type
3. A fully branded quiz is generated automatically -- questions, answer options, scoring, and outcomes pre-styled to match
4. Customize questions, answers, outcome pages, and lead gate
5. Copy the one-line embed snippet and paste it into any Squarespace page
6. The quiz goes live instantly in inline, popup, or floating tab mode
7. Every lead is scored, segmented, and synced to your email marketing platform

## Quiz Builder Features

### Question Builder
- Add unlimited questions
- Answer types: single choice, multiple choice, image-based answers
- Each answer carries a point value that contributes to the final lead score
- Questions support images alongside text
- Custom question order
- Branching paths -- route different users to different questions based on answers
- Progress bar shown to quiz takers throughout

### Outcome Pages
- Multiple personalized result pages based on quiz scores or answer combinations
- Each outcome has its own headline, description, image, and call-to-action button
- Score-based outcomes (point ranges) or logic-based outcomes (specific answer paths)
- Each outcome CTA button has a custom URL
- Outcome pages match your brand design automatically

### Lead Gate
- Email capture form shown after quiz completion, before results are revealed
- Collects email address, name, and custom fields
- Mandatory or optional (skippable) -- your choice
- Every captured lead is automatically tagged, scored, and synced
- Maximizes email capture rate by gating personalized results

### Lead Scoring
- Every quiz submission is automatically scored based on point values assigned to each answer
- Three lead tiers:
  - High: score of 70 or above -- hottest, most sales-ready leads
  - New: score of 40 to 69 -- leads that need nurturing
  - Low: score below 40 -- low-intent visitors
- Lead score and tier are passed to your email platform for automatic segmentation
- High leads can trigger immediate sales follow-up sequences
- New and Low leads go into nurture sequences automatically

### Embed Modes
Three ways to embed on any Squarespace page:

**Inline** -- Quiz appears directly inside page content. Looks native. Best for dedicated quiz landing pages.

**Popup** -- Quiz opens as an overlay triggered by button click, time delay, or scroll depth. Best for adding a quiz to existing pages without redesigning the layout.

**Floating Tab** -- A persistent tab floats on the screen edge as visitors browse. Best for site-wide lead capture without interrupting the browsing experience.

All embed modes are fully branded and match your Squarespace site automatically.

### A/B Testing
- Test multiple quiz variants against each other (different questions, answer option order, styling)
- Automatic traffic splitting between variants
- Statistical significance detection so you know when a winner is confirmed
- Improve completion rates and lead quality over time

### Analytics Dashboard
- Views -- how many people saw the quiz
- Completions -- how many finished it
- Leads -- how many submitted their email
- Lead rate -- percentage of completions that became leads
- Per-question drop-off -- see exactly which question loses people
- Outcome distribution -- see which result page most quiz takers land on
- All data available in the dashboard in real time

## AI Brand Matching

When you paste your Squarespace URL:
- AI reads your site color palette and applies it to quiz background, buttons, and answer cards
- AI detects your typography and uses the same font family throughout the quiz
- AI reads your brand copy tone and business type to inform question and outcome language
- Result is a quiz that looks completely native to your website
- No color picking, no font selection, no design decisions required

This is what separates Squarespell from Typeform, Outgrow, Interact, and Involve.me -- those tools require you to manually recreate your brand inside their builder. Squarespell does it automatically from your URL.

## Quiz Types and Use Cases

**Product Recommendation Quiz** -- Help e-commerce visitors find the right product based on preferences, needs, or goals. Each outcome recommends a product with a direct purchase link.

**Lead Qualification Quiz** -- Score and filter inbound leads before they book a call or fill a contact form. Route high-scoring leads to a calendar link, nurture lower-scoring leads via email.

**Client Discovery Quiz** -- Used by coaches, consultants, and service providers to understand a prospect before an intro call. Results tell both sides what kind of support is needed.

**Service Fit Quiz** -- Let visitors self-select which package or service tier is right for them. Each outcome recommends a specific offer with a CTA to book or buy.

**Personality Quiz** -- Engage visitors with a fun, shareable quiz that reveals a personality type or style category. Results lead naturally into email capture and product or service recommendation.

**Style Quiz** -- Popular with interior designers, fashion businesses, and home decor brands. Match visitors to products or collections based on aesthetic preferences.

**Health and Wellness Assessment** -- Ask about goals, habits, and challenges. Recommend the right coaching program, supplement, or membership.

**Course or Program Selector** -- Route visitors to the right course, membership tier, or learning path from your offer suite.

**Real Estate Buyer/Seller Quiz** -- Qualify leads by property goals, budget, and timeline. Route serious leads directly to a consultation booking.

## Industry Templates

13 pre-built templates available, each with pre-written questions, answer options, outcome pages, and scoring logic:

1. Photography business client quiz
2. Wedding vendor fit quiz
3. Health and wellness coach quiz
4. Real estate buyer qualifier
5. Business coach discovery quiz
6. E-commerce product finder
7. Interior design style quiz
8. Fitness coach client quiz
9. Financial advisor fit quiz
10. Online course selector
11. Marketing agency client qualifier
12. Food and dining business quiz
13. General service business lead qualifier

## Integrations

**Email Marketing**
- Mailchimp -- leads added to lists or audiences with tags based on quiz outcome and score tier
- Klaviyo -- leads added to lists with profile properties including score, tier, and outcome
- ConvertKit -- leads added to sequences based on outcome or score
- ActiveCampaign -- leads added with tags, score, and custom field data (via Zapier)

**Spreadsheets**
- Google Sheets -- every lead logged as a new row with all quiz data, score, and individual answers
- Airtable -- leads added as records with full quiz response data (via Zapier)

**Automation**
- Zapier -- connect to 5,000+ apps including HubSpot, Salesforce, Slack, Notion, and any other tool
- Webhooks -- send raw lead data to any custom endpoint

**Data passed with every lead**
- Email address and name
- Quiz score (numeric)
- Score tier (High, New, or Low)
- Quiz outcome name
- Individual answer to each question
- Timestamp

## Pricing

Three plans billed monthly or yearly (yearly saves approximately 25-35%). A 14-day free trial with full Pro-tier access is available, no credit card required.

- Core: entry plan, 3 quizzes, 500 leads/month, 1,000 emails/month
- Pro: 10 quizzes, 2,000 leads/month, 10,000 emails/month
- Business: unlimited quizzes, 10,000 leads/month, 50,000 emails/month, Zapier and Webhook support

Current prices and exact limits: https://app.squarespell.com/tools/quiz-funnel#pricing

## Who It Is For

Squarespell Quiz is built specifically for Squarespace site owners who want to convert website visitors into segmented email leads using an interactive quiz rather than a static contact form. It is not a general-purpose quiz or survey tool for internal use, education, or trivia -- its core use case is marketing lead generation embedded on a live Squarespace website.

**Primary users:**
- Service businesses on Squarespace: coaches, consultants, photographers, videographers, copywriters, designers, wedding vendors
- E-commerce brands on Squarespace who want product recommendation quizzes
- Course creators and educators segmenting audiences by goal or experience level
- Health and wellness professionals qualifying clients before sessions
- Real estate agents qualifying buyer and seller leads
- Marketing agencies building lead funnels for Squarespace clients
- Squarespace designers and Circle members adding quiz capability to client sites

## Compared to Alternatives

**vs Typeform** -- Typeform is a standalone form tool. It does not match your Squarespace brand automatically, starts at $29/month for basic quiz features, and embeds as a visible iframe that breaks the native design. Squarespell starts at $9/month and matches your brand from your URL automatically.

**vs Outgrow** -- Outgrow is a general interactive content platform not built for Squarespace. It starts at $22-$45/month and requires significant setup time and manual branding. Squarespell is 3-5x cheaper and goes live in minutes.

**vs Interact** -- Interact is a dedicated quiz tool but requires manual template customization to match your brand. No AI brand-matching from URL. Squarespell generates your branded quiz automatically.

**vs Involve.me** -- Involve.me is a general form and funnel builder not designed for Squarespace. Squarespell is purpose-built for Squarespace embeds with native design matching.

**vs Jotform** -- Jotform is a form builder with basic quiz features, not designed for Squarespace lead funnels and without AI brand matching.

- Quiz builder: https://app.squarespell.com/tools/quiz-funnel/build
